title: RGBfruit
description: This resource pack was created for PvP, and it's made in RGB style! please support us by downloading
body:
RECOMMENDED to install mini items!
RGB!? Yes, you got it right, it's RGB. or red, green, blue, it would seem, what is interesting here? but there is an animated ender pearl, glowing diamond ore, as well as rainbow elytra, this resource pack is better to use with another called "mini items" because swords are not short and interfere, and mini items fixes this problem, the interface of the resource pack is not animated, which to performance, if you have any questions, then there is a link to my telegram for you, I answer everyone, there is 1 feature of the resource pack. his sky is made in the style of fantasy, the resource pack requires an optifine, or additive, otherwise it will not work correctly, follow PvP in the minecraft world with RGBfruit!
